name: Arjun Sharma
bio: Arjun loves building clean user interfaces and has 3 years of experience with HTML, CSS and JavaScript.

name: Priya Nair
bio: Priya creates beautiful and intuitive designs. She believes good design should be invisible and just work.

name: Ravi Kumar
bio: Ravi builds the engines that power applications. He specialises in databases and server-side logic.
